Synopsis: Lynx is the fucking definition of a dork. He makes a living off of valorant, sure, but in terms of his love life... yikes. Not so hot. Like, obviously people want him, but its usually for money and hookups with his hot af friends. (Me too.) This doesn't deter him from crushing on you, though. A major idol with a silly social media presence. When he posts on his main account on how hot you are, you almost have to join and check in on the streamer whos fans who've brought you this wave of attention.
